topic: A Sanad office in Muscat moved 40 client work permits off WhatsApp — no missed renewals in six months
format: Before/after of a single workflow: same task, two completely different experiences
post:
Six months ago, a Sanad office in Muscat was tracking 40 client work permits on WhatsApp.

Renewals buried in threads. Reminders sent manually. Deadlines caught by whoever happened to remember.

Then they moved to SmartPro Hub.

Same 40 permits. Same team. Zero missed renewals in six months.

The team didn't suddenly get more organized — the platform just tracks every expiry date, flags deadlines before they become problems, and keeps each client's documents in one place instead of scattered across a dozen chat threads.

Sanad office management shouldn't depend on a group admin holding everything together by memory.

SmartPro Hub was built for exactly this: work permit tracking, PRO services workflows, and client document management built around how Oman businesses actually operate. Not a generic system retrofitted for the region.

Starter plans from OMR 12/month. 14-day free trial, no credit card needed.

If your team is still using WhatsApp to track compliance deadlines — what's actually stopping you from switching?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
